title: schizachyrium scoparium var. stoloniferum
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium var. stoloniferum, also known as little bluestem, is a type of flowering plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds such as sesquiterpenes and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schizachyrium scoparium var. stoloniferum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbal practitioners also using it in salves and infusions for topical applications.
